title: National Heatwave Emergency
description: A record-breaking heatwave overwhelms hospitals and power grids.

A.title: Mandate cooling centers and emergency shelters

turns.speaker: security
turns.text: Mandatory cooling centers save lives. Heatwaves kill faster than people realize.

turns.speaker: rights
turns.text: Mandates restrict freedom. People should choose where they go.

turns.speaker: security
turns.text: Choice means nothing when people underestimate danger. Heat kills silently.

turns.speaker: rights
turns.text: Then educate them — don’t force them.
